allow: Bash(mysql -u root srms_college -e "SHOW COLUMNS FROM o_srms_settings;")

Bash(/Applications/XAMPP/xamppfiles/bin/mysql -u root srmsportal_doit -e "SELECT StudentNumber, FirstName, LastName, Status FROM studentsignup WHERE StudentNumber = '813895442';")
Bash(/Applications/XAMPP/xamppfiles/bin/mysql -u root srmsportal_doit -e "SELECT DISTINCT YearLevel FROM semesterstude WHERE SY='2026-2027' AND Semester='First Semester' AND Status='Enrolled';")

Bash(/Applications/XAMPP/xamppfiles/bin/mysql -u root srmsportal_doit -e "SELECT StudentNumber, YearLevel, Course, Status FROM semesterstude WHERE SY='2026-2027' AND Semester='First Semester' AND Status='Enrolled' AND YearLevel='1st';")

Bash(/Applications/XAMPP/xamppfiles/bin/mysql -u root srmsportal_doit -e "SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT TRIM\(StudentNumber\)\) AS cnt FROM semesterstude WHERE TRIM\(YearLevel\) IN \('1st Year','1st'\) AND Semester='First Semester' AND SY='2026-2027' AND Status='Enrolled';")

Bash(/Applications/XAMPP/xamppfiles/bin/mysql -u root srmsportal_doit -e "SELECT username, email, LENGTH\(password\) AS pw_len, LEFT\(password,10\) AS pw_prefix, acctStat FROM o_users WHERE position='Student' LIMIT 5;")

Bash(/Applications/XAMPP/xamppfiles/bin/mysql -u root srmsportal_doit -e "SELECT 'o_users' AS tbl, username, email, position FROM o_users WHERE username='813895442' UNION ALL SELECT 'studeprofile', StudentNumber, email, '' FROM studeprofile WHERE StudentNumber='813895442' UNION ALL SELECT 'studentsignup', StudentNumber, email, Status FROM studentsignup WHERE StudentNumber='813895442';")
